title: Arcs: Beyond the Reach
shortDescription: Return to the world of Arcs with a set of expansions brimming with new strategic options and devious characters.
content:
April 2026 - Kickstarter Campaign Ends
Q3 2026 - Wave #1 Express Fulfilment begins (Starter Decks, Beta Displays, Add-On Starter Decks, and Add-On Beta Displays from the Netrunner Starter Kit pledge tier and above)
Q4 2026 - Wave #2 Standard Fulfilment begins (Starter Decks and Beta Displays from the Common Cyberdecks and Quickhacks pledge tiers, Accessories, Add-Ons, and Non-Foil and Foil Lucy Cards)

From the end of the Kickstarter campaign to Q3 2026, we’ll provide updates on printing and shipping, leading to the start of each fulfillment wave. For more information, see the Shipping & Taxes section.

Despite our preparation and timelines, delays may still occur. This is the nature of manufacturing complex and innovative products. Potential delays may be associated with shipping, customs, or the manufacturing processes.

title: The Official Cyberpunk Trading Card Game
shortDescription: Build Your Crew. Earn Your Legend.
content:

From the end of the Kickstarter campaign to Q3 2026, we’ll provide updates on printing and shipping, leading to the start of each fulfillment wave. For more information, see the Shipping & Taxes section.
